hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$home = if ($env:CODEX_HOME) { $env:CODEX_HOME } else { Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.codex' }; $script = Join-Path $home 'hooks\portable_guard.ps1'; if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $script) { & $script }"

powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$home = if ($env:CODEX_HOME) { $env:CODEX_HOME } else { Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.codex' }; $script = Join-Path $home 'hooks\portable_guard.ps1'; if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $script) { & $script }"
